title: calamagrostis arundinacea var. contracta
intro: Calamagrostis arundinacea var. contracta, also known as contracted meadow grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Calamagrostis arundinacea var. contracta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
